infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: We use the camera so you can capture a chart screenshot to analyse.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: We need access to your photo library so you can select a chart screenshot to analyse.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Trading Chart Analyzer to access your camera so you can capture a chart screenshot to analyse.
plugins.photosPermission: Allow Trading Chart Analyzer to access your photo library so you can select a chart screenshot to analyse.
